title: Create: Smoothiez
description: Small little mod I made with a friend!
body:
# Create: Smoothiez
## All items:
1. Glow Berry Blast
2. Melon Rush
3. Apple Blast
4. Very Berry
5. Glistering Rush

## Why?
We decided that Create needed more drinks rather than foods and wanted to create our own ideas and created this mod

## My plans
- Re-write it, and add more create mod integration
- Add more mod loader support

**This mod's first version was made in MCreator and was recovered from our discord chat, I will eventually refactor the mod into a regular Java project.**
